'''Gursan Bryes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] from [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He was helping the residents of Kachirho defeat the "Enslaver of Kachirho," [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Cyssc Blackscale]]. This confrontation came down to the heroes willing to help against the many [[Realspace/Legends|space]] forces of Lord Cyssc. In the end, the heroes reigned supreme, and Kachirho was free of Lord Cyssc's wrath. Each was presented with a [[Kamino/Legends|Kaminoan]] great staff by Bryes.

==Behind the scenes==
Gursan Bryes appeared as a non-player character in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
